violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the ware washing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The hand-washing sink in the restrooms were lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Milk was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Sauces was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

(Sanitizer) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Utensils at the bar were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
Low boy located in the coffee area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 51F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1) Walk-in freezer (frost buildup) 2) Kitchen shelving (soil residue and other debris) 3) Fan (dust and other debris) New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The ice machine, server ice well, and bar ice well are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
